bullets.text: Led end-to-end product delivery for a global suite of technology programs, managing full product lifecycles from discovery through launch with individual budgets ranging from $500K to $5M.
Defined and owned cross-functional product roadmaps aligned to company OKRs, coordinating engineering, design, data, and go-to-market teams across distributed global teams.
Reduced delivery timelines by 15% through agile process optimization and sprint cadence improvements across a portfolio of concurrent product programs.
Implemented performance dashboards and KPI reporting frameworks, increasing on-time feature delivery rates by 20% year-over-year and improving stakeholder visibility across the product portfolio.
Built and maintained strong executive-level stakeholder relationships, translating ambiguous business requirements into clear product strategies and measurable delivery milestones.
Administered over $5M in annual program budgets across 20–40 concurrent enterprise technology initiatives, identifying cost efficiencies without compromising product scope or quality.
Drove product discovery and user research initiatives to inform roadmap prioritization, leveraging data-driven insights to increase user engagement by 30% and improve retention metrics.
Served as cross-functional program lead across Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success — aligning teams on GTM strategy, launch milestones, and post-launch success metrics.
Directed emergency technology deployments under mission-critical conditions, delivering fully operational systems on compressed timelines while maintaining compliance and quality standards.
Partnered with data science and ML engineering teams to bring AI-powered product features from concept to production, managing model evaluation cycles, stakeholder reviews, and phased rollout plans.
Managed a portfolio of 10+ concurrent SaaS product initiatives ranging from $500K to $1M, coordinating cross-functional teams across sales, engineering, and customer success to hit quarterly OKRs.
Spearheaded the launch of a connected fitness platform feature set, coordinating hardware integrations, API partnerships, and app store releases — achieving 40% growth in MAU within two quarters.
Led the build-out of a sports analytics data platform, translating real-time performance data into actionable product features for coaches, athletes, and enterprise clients.
Formalized agile program governance using Jira and Confluence, establishing sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospective cadences that improved team velocity by 25%.

Progressed from technical operations into senior product and program leadership, building expertise across SaaS platforms, API integrations, Microsoft 365, and enterprise systems — bridging the gap between technical teams and business stakeholders.
